name: Lima Bean & Leek Soup
recipeInstructions:
This recipe would be vegan if the fish sauce and bouillon cubes are eliminated and vegetable bouillon and extra soy used in their place. It would taste even better with the addition of a good stewing chicken, but it was created from materials on hand one weekend.
1. Bring water to a boil in a soup pot.
2. Add lentils; simmer covered for 30 minutes or more.
3. Add lima beans and cook another 30 minutes.
4. Add rice and cook another 20 minutes.
5. Add chopped green portions of the leek and simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Add sliced white portion of the leek and remaining ingredients.
7. Simmer for an additional 15 minutes before serving.
